scope: 9 Iranian portals previously documented as blocked in the 2026-05-02 Iran/Caucasus sweep. Reachability-only retest. Search execution deferred. Probes ran from a UK/EU baseline plus an Uzbekistan VPN route for the geo-IP-blocked subset.
geopolitical_caveat: Iranian internet infrastructure is currently subject to wartime intermittent shutdowns (2026 conflict). Portal reachability documented here is point-in-time as of 2026-05-10; a portal blocked or reachable on this date may flip on subsequent days. Researchers replicating these probes should expect different results across attempts. The taxonomy entries 'still_blocked', 'reachable_*', etc. should be read as a single observation, not a durable property of the portal.

method_summary.tier_1: WebFetch direct HTTP from session baseline IP (UK/EU)
method_summary.tier_3: Playwright headless browser (executes JS redirects, follows DOM); ran from local machine routed through Uzbekistan VPN for the second pass on geo-IP-blocked targets, then re-tested without VPN to disambiguate JS-redirect failures from genuine geo-IP blocks
method_summary.deferred: Wayback Machine snapshots not collected this session; can be added in a follow-on if last-known-live evidence becomes useful for any portal

probes.portal: NLAI (National Library and Archives of Iran)
probes.original_block_2026_05_02: ECONNREFUSED on direct HTTP fetch from outside Iran; geo-IP-gated per Digital Orientalist 2023

probe_attempts.outcome: ECONNREFUSED
ECONNREFUSED
jina mirror rejected with 422 Unprocessable Entity
net::ERR_TIMED_OUT after 60s
net::ERR_TIMED_OUT after 60s

probes.notes: NLAI's geo-IP gate appears to whitelist Iranian IPs only. Uzbekistan VPN did not unlock access. Iran-resident collaborator or Iranian IP required for any future search execution.

probes.original_block_2026_05_02: ECONNREFUSED on direct HTTP fetch; international.ut.ac.ir English page resolves but is non-searchable

probe_attempts.outcome: redirect screen 'Transferring to the website...' (Persian + English); body ~150 chars; JS redirect not executed by webfetch
ECONNREFUSED

reachable; redirect executed; final URL https://library.ut.ac.ir/fa; page title 'کتابخانه مرکزی' (Central Library); navigation, news section, contentinfo with University of Tehran branding all rendered
net::ERR_TIMED_OUT after 60s
reachable; redirect executed; same final URL https://library.ut.ac.ir/fa and same rendered content as VPN route — confirms the portal does NOT enforce geo-IP gating on the main landing

probes.notes: Major change: library.ut.ac.ir is now reachable via any JS-capable browser, with or without a VPN. The earlier WebFetch failure was specifically a JS-redirect-execution limitation in the lightweight HTML processor, not a geo-IP block; Playwright executes the redirect and renders the same Persian landing whether routed through Uzbekistan VPN or via the session baseline IP. This means a follow-on Cihanşah/Hakîkî search execution against the manuscript catalogue can be run from any IP using a headless browser. The utdlib.ut.ac.ir digital subdomain still times out (separate sub-resource, possibly retired).

probes.original_block_2026_05_02: ECONNREFUSED + 'temporarily out of service' per Digital Orientalist 2023

probe_attempts.outcome: HTTP 403 Forbidden (block mode changed from ECONNREFUSED to 403)
ECONNREFUSED
page title 'Error 403 | Access Denied'; same 403 from VPN route

probes.notes: Block mode shifted from ECONNREFUSED (server unreachable) to 403 (server reachable but actively rejecting). Server is alive and serving error pages — this is a behaviour change worth noting. The 'temporarily out of service' framing from 2023 no longer applies; the 403 is consistent across VPN routes, suggesting an explicit access-control rule rather than a network outage.

probes.original_block_2026_05_02: ECONNREFUSED + geo-IP gated per Digital Orientalist 2023

probe_attempts.outcome: loading-screen placeholder + domain-sale notice; ~80-100 chars of substantive text; not the library portal
ECONNREFUSED
redirected to https://*.yoyanetaq.sbs/.../index.php?... 'Security Check' page; aqlibrary.org domain is parked / hijacked / redirected to clickbait infrastructure
net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED — DNS does not resolve digital.aqlibrary.ir at all

probes.notes: MAJOR CHANGE: aqlibrary.org no longer hosts the Astan-e Quds Razavi library. The domain redirects to a parked-domain / security-check chain (yoyanetaq.sbs). The digital subdomain digital.aqlibrary.ir does not resolve in DNS. The Razavi library has presumably moved to a different domain (candidates: aqr.ir, library.aqr.ir, or a sub-path of the larger Astan Quds Razavi institutional site). New URL discovery is out of scope for this reachability retry; flag for a follow-on rediscovery task.

probes.original_block_2026_05_02: HTTP 403 Forbidden on marashilibrary.com via direct HTTP fetch and third-party HTML mirroring

probe_attempts.outcome: page title 'کتابخانه آیت الله مرعشی نجفی (ره)' (Library of Ayatollah Marashi Najafi); search interface visible: 'جستجو از منابع این کتابخانه' (Search library resources) with manuscripts / lithograph / introductory categories; ~45,000-50,000 characters of content; no blocking markers

probes.notes: MAJOR CHANGE: Marashi-Najafi (one of Iran's largest Persian-MS collections, Qom) is fully reachable on the first WebFetch attempt with no VPN. The 2026-05-02 403 Forbidden has been lifted. The search interface explicitly offers a manuscripts category. This is the highest-value newly-reachable portal in the retry — direct candidate for a follow-on Cihanşah/Hakîkî search-execution session.

probe_attempts.outcome: ECONNREFUSED
jina mirror rejected with 422 Unprocessable Entity
net::ERR_TIMED_OUT after 60s

probes.notes: mtif.org remains unreachable across direct HTTP, jina mirror, and Uzbekistan-routed Playwright. Same as 2026-05-02. The Marashi printed catalogue index hosted here remains inaccessible online; printed-volume access via library is still the only path.

probe_attempts.outcome: ECONNREFUSED
jina mirror rejected with 422 Unprocessable Entity
net::ERR_TIMED_OUT after 60s

probes.notes: malekmuseum.org remains unreachable across all three tiers. The current Malek National Library may be on a different domain (malek.ir or similar); URL rediscovery is out of scope here.

probe_attempts.outcome: ECONNREFUSED (block mode shifted from login-wall to network-level rejection)

page title 'کتابخانه مدرسه فقاهت' (Feqahat School Library); content fully visible via mirror; navigation menus, library description ('7634 عنوان کتاب در 17691 جلد' = 7,634 titles in 17,691 volumes), category links (Jurisprudence, Quranic Studies, Hadith Sciences, Ethics, Theology, etc.)
TimeoutError after 60s on direct browser navigation

probes.notes: Direct browser access (with or without VPN) is blocked, but the r.jina.ai third-party mirror successfully returns full content. Search execution via jina mirror is feasible for static catalogue browsing but interactive search forms may not work through the mirror — consider this caveat when planning a follow-on search session. Note this collection is Shi'i jurisprudence / hadith focused; relevance to Cihanşah Hakîkî is low (Hurufi-leaning Turkmen poetry sits outside this collection's scope), so probe execution priority is low.

probe_attempts.outcome: Too many redirects (exceeded 10) — redirect-loop server config
page title 'Error 504 | Gateway Timeout'; mirror successfully fetched but the underlying ketab.ir server is returning 504
page title 'Error 504 | Gateway Timeout'; same 504 via VPN route — server-side issue independent of client IP

probes.notes: ketab.ir is currently returning 504 Gateway Timeout server-side (not a client-side block). The 2026-05-02 403 has shifted to a server outage. Worth re-probing at a future date in case the outage is transient. Note: ketab.ir is a national books portal, not a manuscripts portal, so relevance to the Hakîkî manuscript census is indirect.

newly_reachable_portals: Marashi-Najafi Library (marashilibrary.com): full search interface present, no blocking — direct WebFetch success
Tehran University Central Library (library.ut.ac.ir): landing page renders via Playwright with Uzbekistan VPN; deeper catalogue navigation pending
reachable_via_jina_only_portals: lib.eshia.ir: jina mirror returns full content; direct + VPN paths blocked
still_blocked_portals: NLAI (opac.nlai.ir, nlai.ir): geo-IP strict — Uzbekistan VPN does not unlock
Bonyad-i Muhaqqiq Tabataba'i (mtif.org): timeout across all tiers
Malek National Library (malekmuseum.org): timeout across all tiers
summary._note_tehran_u_digital_subdomain: Tehran University's utdlib.ut.ac.ir digital subdomain timed out separately from the main library.ut.ac.ir landing; the latter is reachable so the portal as a whole is counted in newly_reachable, with the digital subdomain noted as a sub-block in the Tehran U probe entry.
now_dead_or_changed_portals: Astan-e Quds Razavi (aqlibrary.org): domain hijacked / parked / redirects to yoyanetaq.sbs Security Check; digital.aqlibrary.ir DNS does not resolve — library has likely migrated to a new domain (URL rediscovery needed)
Majlis (ical.ir): block mode shifted from ECONNREFUSED to 403 Forbidden
ketab.ir: block mode shifted from 403 to 504 Gateway Timeout (server-side outage)
ready_for_search_execution: marashilibrary.com (HIGH PRIORITY: large Persian-MS collection, reachable on first try)
library.ut.ac.ir (MEDIUM PRIORITY via Playwright, with or without VPN: Tehran 8198 codicology target; manuscript-catalogue navigation depth not yet probed)
lib.eshia.ir via jina mirror (LOW PRIORITY: collection scope is Shi'i jurisprudence, low Hakîkî relevance)
follow_on_tasks_surfaced: Astan-e Quds Razavi URL rediscovery: locate the library's current online catalogue domain (candidates: aqr.ir, library.aqr.ir, library.razavi.ir or similar)
Marashi-Najafi search-execution session: probe the manuscripts category for Cihanşah, Hakîkî, جهانشاه, حقیقی author/title queries
Tehran University manuscript-catalogue navigation: drill into library.ut.ac.ir/fa to locate the MS 8198 record and any digitised images / extended codicology
Wayback Machine evidence collection: capture last-known-live snapshots for now-dead aqlibrary.org / digital.aqlibrary.ir to document what was lost
